entry.title: Re: Ship.condition 02 loading grp 0003 plant MMC1 StLoc M...

Hello,
Did you try to fill the customizing table with the parameters mentioned in the error message?

entry.title: Re: SAC planning model - delete duplicate records
entry.content: @MaxT, you have to specify a measure either through MEMBERSET [d/Measure] = "XXXX" or directly in RESULTLOOKUPs

entry.title: Re: Google Play Store - Publish Rejected
entry.content: Hi @Dan_Wroblewski @MaiaraEllwanger @marihirvi request your help in resolving these

entry.title: Re: How to setup and configure SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
@MeenaPrakash You could:

  • Create an automation with Outlook to send it (but you'd a machine with Outlook connected)
  • Use an Action to call an API that sends mail (but you'd need an API)
  • Fix the error you get -- in the end you will need an SMTP server to send your mails. Maybe the configuration has an error?

entry.title: Re: Usage of ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) for developments in SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi @hugopereira ,

this blog relates to developments inside of SAP BTP ABAP Environment, there is only tier 1 (cloud-ready) development possible. For setup of the ATC check variant for 3-tier developments in SAP S/4HANA systems (>= 2022 release) see please the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-the-abap-test-cockpit-supports-you-to-adopt-abap-cloud/ba-p/13548202

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Renewal of SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi dilipkumbhar,

Contact the Channel Sales Manager for the same. You can find the contact here:

SAP Business One Country Localizations & Contacts 

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: OKX Invitation Code: OK1907 [2024] Mystery Box
entry.content:
What is OKX invitation code?

The OKX exchange features a continuous referral program. You can participate using the OKX invitation code “OK1907” during sign-up. The exchange offers up to 10K USDT and two mystery boxes for creating an account. This guide will show you how to use the OKX invitation code 2024. Apart from the welcome offer, there are other benefits that you could enjoy.

entry.title: Re: Replacing bdc by suitable bapi
entry.content:
Hi Surya,

this is rather a Material Management question, not a Connectivity (network protocols) question or a Development (ABAP programming language) question. So I have added the Material Management tag.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps asking login for Integrations
entry.content: Is it possible to send the top-level link to your learning material, so I can see how the backend was created?

entry.title: Re: Learning Hub erwerben als Privatperson
entry.content:
Hallo @PatrickL,
um hier weiterhelfen zu  können, bitte ich Sie, mir die Ticket-Nummer mitzuteilen.
Viele Grüße
Margit Wagner

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to express my sincere interest in the SAP digital skills initiative and to humbly request consideration for a free opportunity to obtain an SAP certification.

My current economic situation is quite challenging. I am struggling financially and already have a substantial loan that I am working hard to repay. Despite my best efforts, the high cost of the SAP certification is beyond my reach. This certification, however, is of utmost importance to me as my company is strongly encouraging me to obtain it to continue my career growth within the SAP ecosystem.

I believe I align with the objectives of the SAP digital skills initiative. I am a first-generation college student and economically very poor, which presents additional hurdles in my professional journey. As someone who faces financial hardships and is determined to advance in the technology industry, I see this certification as a crucial step towards achieving my professional goals. Furthermore, the opportunity to acquire these digital skills would significantly enhance my career prospects and enable me to contribute more effectively to my organization.

I am fully committed to undergoing the rigors of studying for the SAP certification and have a strong willingness to learn. I understand the value of this opportunity and am prepared to invest the necessary time and effort to succeed.

I kindly ask for your understanding and consideration of my request for a free certification opportunity. This support would not only alleviate my financial burden but also empower me to progress in my career and overcome the economic challenges I currently face.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration. I look forward to your positive response.

Warm regards,

Nishith Kumar Gupta

PFA the completion mail of the learning hub course module.

entry.title: Re: Stamp Duty Tax Configuration in SAP Business One for...
entry.content:
Hi @nareshcr77 ,

In essence, it's not possible to calculate tax at the document level, as details contained at the line level may be relevant for determining the tax, such as item, item group, g/l account, warehouse, and so on. Even though you might have an all-harmonized invoice where all the lines follow the same criteria for tax determination, the system structure is not designed for this, so you must inform the tax code on each line, as you are already doing.

The only thing I can think of as a workaround (considering I don't know the local rules), is using something that affects the document as a whole, like Freight, and create a new entry e.g. Stamp Duty Tax where you would set up the related G/L account to be credited in this transaction. The impacts of doing such a thing should be considered in all fronts, as usual. Sorry if that sound a little bit silly, but I can't go further here.

Good luck!

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Error while passing payload using postman - please help
entry.content: It seems that the inputs are defined as strings but you are sending integers. But without seeing the definition and the Postman call, it is tough to tell.

entry.title: Innovations Highlights from SAP Business Technology Platform - Sapphire 2024
entry.content:
Sapphire is always a highlight. But this year it was a special Sapphire. With this year´s event theme "Bring Out Your Best" our latest business AI innovations, products, and partnerships were highlighted. Take a look at this blog post where I want to focus on the most important announcements of SAP BTP at Sapphire 2024 (also non-AI related). In addition let´s explore innovation highlights coming up in the future. Enjoy reading on.

Clean Core Strategy with New SAP Build and ABAP Cloud Features

Following a clean core strategy means keeping your systems as unmodified as possible and creating your custom code in a way that does not effect upgrades and adoption of the latest innovations. But there is still the need to tailor your systems to your own businesses. To achieve this, we recommend that you go for side-by-side extensibility scenarios with SAP BTP, meaning that you build your own extensions to SAP systems on SAP BTP, whenever possible. SAP BTP offers three main options for this scenario: SAP Build low-code solutions, SAP Build Code and SAP BTP ABAP Environment.

If we look at ABAP, the first highlight is the Joule´s ABAP Developer capabilities, which will contain multiple features all tailored to increase developer efficiency. It will be the GitHub Copilot for the ABAP world embedded directly into the ABAP Development Tools in Eclipse (ADT). You will receive functionality embedded into wizards and an integrated chat. Planned GenAI features are explain ABAP code and CDS code, test and test data generation for ABAP and CDS, ABAP code completion, and many more. 

 

To simplify this process, we are building a way to access SAP Build directly from S/4HANA. Providing the ability to access SAP Build directly and with context from SAP S/4HANA, your development teams and their business stakeholders will be able to create new processes and process extensions much faster and more convenient than in the past. 

 

 

Guided experiences in SAP Build Work Zone

In addition the Guided experiences in SAP Build Work Zone let developers create step-by-step line-of-business workflows. This simplifies complex business processes through automation without custom code. With the Guided experiences, you can empower your workforce with seamless digital experiences tailored to their needs, boosting user satisfaction, engagement, and retention. You can automate tasks and streamline processes, allowing employees to focus on high-impact work.

Accelerate enterprise automation with AI

We are also enriching our Process Automation offering with Joule. Our GenAI-based copilot will help you to simply specify in natural language what kind of workflow or automation you would like to have. In addition our tools, with the help of different large language models, will help you either source these artifacts from available content, or they will generate new process and automation content for them using the power of AI.

Accelerate integration with AI

We believe that by embedding AI into SAP Integration Suite, you will be able to shorten project times and integrate applications and systems faster by using AI generated mappings, scripts, and integration flows without even needing to be a high end integration expert. The SAP Integration Suite will improve the quality of integration flows and business processes by helping you identify pre-built content packages or by supporting AI-generated artifacts that fit to your specific requirements. Same as with code or process automation artefacts, you will be able to generate integration artifacts, our so called integration flows, by leveraging generative AI and the Unified Customer Landscape service which provides your specific landscape details as context for the integration.

Anomaly detection with SAP Integration Suite

We are making use of machine-learning based capabilities in SAP Integration Suite to offer API anomaly detection. What this means is that we use Machine Learning to identify issues in your landscapes. Think of a sudden surge or drop in API calls, an increase in latency or an increase in the number of errors detected. We can identify this kind of unusual behavior and actively alert your stuff to these anomalies in API performance. This way, we can help identify and address issues before they escalate, minimizing disruptions and optimizing system performance. 

 

 

Simplified transition

How do I transition from SAP PI / PO to SAP Integration Suite? We know that many of you relying on PI/PO for the daily business and we want to make sure we safeguard the investments you have made. Therefore we will provide a simplified transition from SAP PO to SAP Integration Suite with features like mass migration, reduction of migration templates, and reduction of JMS queues using a pipeline concept. Also, there is a free assessment and planning services available where we provide customer specific recommendations on how to move your integration to the cloud.

If you want to learn more what´s new for Application Development, Automation and Integration on SAP BTP  read the blog post of @thomas_volmering.

Infuse AI in SAP Analytics Cloud

How do we evolve our portfolio in the space of Data and Analytics moving forward? First: We integrate Joule as your GenAI copilot in SAP Analytics Cloud. You can analyze, consume and create story content with Joule moving forward. You also have also the possibility to ask questions and get answers as charts. Or you can generate some scripts to make the story interaction for your end-users richer and more interactive. Remember the just ask feature? This will be integrated with Joule as well. The key thing to understand is that while the just ask feature is providing natural language query capabilities, Joule will be using this feature as well, but provide a more conversational experience in remembering the conversation and the user progress and integrations.

Extended capabilities in SAP Analytics Cloud

One more thing on Data and Analytics, as it touches both the themes of openness and connectivity. Later this year it is planned that SAP Analytics Cloud content will be able to natively be integrated with Microsoft PowerPoint. Using our add-in, you can intuitively connect to an SAP Analytics Cloud tenant and find user-created content to integrate into your presentation. For example stories, in which business users communicate business information using a combination of data and visual elements (like, building a heat map of North America illustrating where a company’s sales are overperforming and underperforming commercial expectations). Or Widgets, which are visual elements used to tell stories (for example, charts, tables, geographical maps, or buttons).

SAP Analytics Cloud will also let you connect to SQL data sources as live data connections. This eliminates the need for direct data replication, resulting in much faster access to real-time data, reduced data storage requirements, more reliable data consistency, improved system performance and lower costs.

More to come...

For me personally it has been a quite impressive and innovative Sapphire 2024. If you want to explore more highlights coming up in 2024 watch the replay of my session "Explore the road map of SAP BTP".

You did not make it in person or virtually? No worries, you still have the chance to watch the replays and especially the Opening Keynote of Christian Klein and Julia White. Explore the SAP Sapphire News Guide 2024  to learn more about the announcements.
Interested in more innovation highlights coming up? Then take a look at our Road Map Explorer. We do have more than 1000 innovation highlights planned for SAP BTP 2024.

Also be informed that this blog and SAP's strategy and possible future developments, products and or platforms directions and functionality are all subject to change and may be changed by SAP at any time for any reason without notice.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Integration with SBPA (Task UI)
entry.content: Not yet anyway, but you can build UI5 form (granted much more complicated) instead of using the built-in form builder.

entry.title: Re: Issue with posting asset transactions during migratio...
entry.content:
We found the solution, it was a different kind of 'status'. In the app 'Make company code settings - asset accounting-specific', you can change the 'Transfer status' to 'Ongoing (Other postings allowed)'. If you set a transfer status without the allowance, the system blocks all manual asset postings.

Thanks for your attention.

Best regards,

Jan-Niklas Studt

entry.title: CDS view to find the Classification characteristic description field for a supplier
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am currently trying to implement Flexible workflow for PO on SAP public cloud based on the condition that if the Suppliers Classification characteristic description i.e.  P2P exemption is Yes/No. but i am unbale to find the CDS view liking the Supplier/Business partner and the Classification data for them. could you guys help if you know of any CDS view that i can link to achieve this requirement.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Tables for BW-Query Elements (where-used list)
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to find the tables in BW in which I can see where a characteristic with the filter/constant (e.g. company code = 1111) is used in the following BW query elements (where-used list):

Global restricted key figures
Filter
Local restricted key figures

Unfortunately, I have not found the best solution. We are on BW4HANA.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SBPA - How to end a branch without ending the process
entry.content: Can you explain the flow you want a little more? If you end a branch you simple don't put additional activities in it -- then when all branches complete the process continues to more activities (or ends).

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
As someone deeply passionate about embarking on a career in SAP consulting, I have dedicated significant time and effort to advancing my skills and knowledge within the SAP ecosystem. However, circumstances beyond my control pose a significant challenge in meeting the costs associated with the cost of taking a paid certification exam.

I am deeply discouraged by the possibility of not being able to pursue the certification due to financial limitations. It feels like a significant obstacle in my career and personal development journey. I recognize the importance of certification in today's competitive job market.

Additionally, as a member of an underrepresented community, I am committed to breaking barriers and achieving success in the tech industry. Obtaining the SAP certification is not only a personal goal but also a crucial step towards advancing my career aspirations and making a positive impact within my community.

I firmly believe that this certification will equip me with the necessary skills and knowledge to excel in SAP consulting and contribute effectively to the industry. Therefore, I am reaching out to kindly request your support in the form of a fee waiver for the SAP certification exam.

Your assistance would significantly alleviate the financial burden and enable me to focus wholeheartedly on preparing for and successfully passing the exam.
 
If given the chance, I will wholeheartedly dedicate myself to the certification process. I am determined to embody SAP's values and maintain the high standards of excellence that your certification is known for.
 
I hope you will kindly consider my request with compassion and understanding. Your support in this matter would be incredibly meaningful to me and would have a profound impact on my life.

PS: Attached is a completion mail of learning hub course

entry.title: Re: Fiori Horizon theme
entry.content: KBA is not available any more, but the problem still persits. May I ask for further information on this topic?

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to Loading SAP BW hierarchy to Datashp...
entry.content:
Hello @aczeitner 

I think this Blogs comes just in time for you 🙂 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/part-2-import-sap-bw-4hana-queries-into-sap-datasphere-using-sap-bw-4hana/ba-p/13759521 

There you have one example of the Customer Infoobject and all it's tables ... unfortunately it seems to work only with BW4 and BW Bridge.

If you have a BW on HANA, you probably need to create CDS Views to transfer the data into manually created Datasphere tables.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Unable to do SMT Mapping for the fields present in MARC_APS_EXT Table.
entry.content:
‘Target Stock Level’ and ‘Safety Stock Level’ fields are not present in SAP MDG UI but they are present in S4 GUI System under Advanced Planning section and for this Transparent table is MARC_ASPS_EXT in place of MARC.

We are doing development to bring these fields in MDG UI but we are unable to find these fields in MARC Table. Due to this we are not able to do SMT Mapping. During SMT Mapping of MDG_BS_MAT_MAP_2PP and  MDG_BS_MAT_MAP_2STA we are unable to see the fields in MARC Structure.

We’ve found a Transparent table : MARC_APS_EXT in which these fields are present but during SMT Mapping we are not able to view the structure of MARC_APS_EXT Table.

entry.title: Re: Are the SAP AIF related apps available in S/4HANA public cloud?
entry.content: could you please update you answer? When clicking on the link I get: Sorry We couldn't find that page. Go back to the SAP Help Portal home page.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK SDK installation error
entry.content: @Jitendra_Kansal I tried Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Scope CurrentUser but it doesn't seem to be working for me. The other option 'run sh powershell -file main.ps1 check' which returns message 'can't execute binary', could you suggest plz ?

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK SDK installation error
entry.content:
here is my system policy details

Scope ExecutionPolicy

----- ---------------
MachinePolicy : RemoteSigned
UserPolicy : Undefined
Process : Undefined
CurrentUser : Bypass
LocalMachine : Bypass

entry.title: Re: how do I can create a Sourcing Request with service S4HanaRequestForQuotation?

entry.title: Re-issue voided check
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

We are unable to find the option of re-issuing voided check in  SAP public cloud.

We had this functionality in on-premise to delete check information and re-issue the check in case it has been mistakenly voided after issue.

Kindly advise.

entry.title: Re: Post Material BOM | API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_V2 - odata v2
entry.content: I was able to solve it

entry.title: Error received in ewm output
entry.content:
Hi guys,

When the customer issues the goods;

"Delivery XXXXXX item 20: Shipping method status prohibits goods issue

Message no. /SCWM/GOODS_MOVEMENT044"

error is received, I searched on the internet but could not find a solution, can you support me?

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content:
Hi @mwn 

By "still don't have access to the model" I am assuming you mean to the model processor, same error as before? 

I'm curious about the npm install command you ran, I'm assuming here that the editor / renderer on this platform has swallowed the @sap part? 

If both my assumptions are correct, then I would guess your issue is down to how you tried to update the CDS Development Kit. I don't know your local setup, but you probably want to install it globally, i.e. use the --global (or -g) option:

npm install --global @sap/cds-dk

HTH!

entry.title: Re: Execute custom logic at permission import
entry.content:
Dear Christian,

 IDs are case sensitive. The only exception are EMail addresses which are stored as lower case letters in the database (case insensitive). If you observe a different behavior please open a ticket with a reproduceable example.

Best regards Andreas Bettin

entry.title: Re: Post Material BOM | API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_V2 - odata v2
Re: Post Material BOM | API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_V2 - odata v2
entry.content:
This is the body JSON that I'm using:

{
    "Material": "SUPERBIKE",
    "Plant": "",
    "BillOfMaterialVariantUsage": "1",
    "BillOfMaterialVariant": "1",
    "BillOfMaterialAuthsnGrp": "",
    "BOMVersionStatus": "",
    "BOMTechnicalType": "M",
    "BOMGroup": "",
    "BOMHeaderText": "API test",
    "BOMAlternativeText": "",
    "BillOfMaterialStatus": "1",
    "BOMHeaderBaseUnit": "PC",
    "BOMHeaderQuantityInBaseUnit": "2"
}

entry.title: Re: MRP run on materials shared between plant and MRP area
entry.content:
see my original comment: ... First have a look at MRP customizing 'Define Storage Location and Supply Area Determination in BOM Explosion' ( SPRO ... MRP -> Procument Proposals -> Planned Orders ) .... .... and set the SLoc determination customizing for the component so that the SLoc is inherited from the prod. version.

If you dont success then you might want to describe the settings you tried and their results. Then maybe somebody is willing to help with further answers.

entry.title: Re: Renewal of SAP Business One
entry.content:
If these licenses are perpetual, you should still have access to the 33 licenses on the version you were when you stopped paying your AMC.

Your partner should be able to assist you with a quote from SAP to get up to date with your AMC. Depending on when you stopped paying the AMC you will have to pay backdated up to the present date to be able to upgrade to the latest version.

Else contact SAP directly if your partner is unable to assist

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Achieves International Business Communication Standards (IBCS) Re-Certificat
entry.content: Excellent blog and I'm very happy to see all these improvements on IBCS in the SAC stories! Thanks.

entry.title: Intercompany payment runs through an international account
entry.content:
Posting on behalf of my finance team:

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA public cloud for a UK based client which has multiple companies in UK and NL.  They are unable to pay a NL company invoice on a payment run through a NL account as this entity does not have a bank account.  Workarounds with dummy accounts have been suggested, but can you explain why international bank payments are not standard SAP practice in SAP S/4HANA public cloud?

entry.title: Re: SAPCAR GUI
entry.content:
Hello folks,

this useful utility seems to be not available anymore. The download links reply with a 404 page.

Is there a backup somewhere or a sucessor? Should I look somewhere else?

 

Kind Regards

Eric

entry.title: Unable to reduce / clean up request reduction in ADSO ( House Keeping activities )
Re: Is there a way to inherit authorization setting from...
entry.content:
Hello @aczeitner 

I'm not aware of it that you could somehow generate Datasphere Access Controls (Tables & Views) out of SAP BW authorizations.

You probably need to create all the tables and DACs manually. See this blog as example:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-datasphere-implementing-row-level-security-using-data-access-controls/ba-p/13577455

Maybe it helps to check table RSECVAL_STRING in you BW for all auth. relevant objects and the attribute values.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: New Extensibility Guide for S/4HANA is available

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now error: configuration file could not be...

I pumped into the same situation error and it´s great to learn from your experience. 

I could access these sub-group (i.e. Knowledge Management, Manufacturing, etc.) through its published link, but not the Group BA Content. 

Even though I´ve followed the advice of making sure all the objects within "BA Content" are published, whenever I click on BA Content link, this error keeps popping up "Necessary Configuration File cannot be loaded":


I would appreciate a lot if you could share any advice. Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Facing the Unhandled Exception Error while doing the...
entry.content:
Hi Krish_SAP 

Please check if issue is same as in note   3377581.

If not, please let us know exact version of SAP Business One and exact steps to reproduce the issue.

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: no action control found while creating Vehicle master
entry.content:
In T code VELOS, enter the Vehicle model, plant, primary and secondary action control as shown in the below image.

then after if you got other error like "No valid configuration profile found for MARA......"

for this error go to T Code CU41, there maintain the profile for the material...

if it shows as it is already maintained go to CU42 and check whether the status is released or locked, (it should be released, so make it as released)

or else, if you are unable to make it as released then, go to MM02, go to classification tab, there you maintain some class as shown in the below image.

I checked the system status (BS23). Good movement is allowed, but when i create good issue against reservation I face some issues.

Please Find attached Screenshots.

entry.title: Re: Working with Cross HDI Container Access Scenarios in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Sreedevi,

Followed all the steps still facing below issue, could you please suggest how this can be resolved.

Error: service ServiceName_1 not found; the service definition does not exist.

Regards,

Prem Kumar S

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting requirements does not consider plant's...
entry.content:
Master Data MRP Area


MRP area called SUB_001 available to plan separately associated components. SAP suggested maintaining the MRP area parameters to all components which are planned under the MRP area in MRP 1 view (Material R-100-101).

 



Click on MRP areas and maintain the MRP parameters as like plant parameters.

 



It is important to maintain MRP 2 special procurement to 45 - Stock transfer from plant to MRP area.

 



Make a note that you need to adopt data while entering MRP area parameters and save material.

Subcontracting Process Execution

 

Demand Flow


Forecast updated for subcontracting header material called F-100-101.

 

 

MRP Live


After forecast updated runs MRP live.

 



Based on MRP live log total of 4 materials planned 1 material with classic MRP and another 3 with MRP on HANA.

Analyzing MRP results


After MRP run completed purchase requisitions created for header article based on planning horizon.

 



Now go to component R-100-101 and analyze the result at a plant level and MRP area level.

Plant level - Stock transfer reservations from the plant to the provision stock of the subcontractor.

 



MRP area level - Procure the components that you provide to a subcontractor for the production of an assembly, by transferring stock from a plant to the MRP area of the subcontractor.

Conclusion: in the Vendor MRP Area, you need to maintain special procurement key as 45 for it to raise a TR, and create a reservation at the plant level for your stock consumption.

entry.title: Routes cannot be mapped to destinations in different spaces
entry.content:
hi, when working on this tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-cf-security-xsuaa-create.html#96bf4d90-d49d-4e27-8ebe-40b1e2da969a

got this error: For application 'product-list': Routes cannot be mapped to destinations in different spaces

that is when pushing to btp (after being logged-in).

any idea?

thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP - Trigger workflow events upon save action in RAP Applications
entry.content: Great Job Abdelrahman , Thanks for sharing

entry.title: Re: Applying Clean Code Principles in SAP UI5 Development - Reality check
entry.content: Beautifully written with examples. Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1: UDO form can still be edited after Close
entry.content:
Hi kinyanjuikamau,

This is the correct system behavior.
The ability to update after close, also exists in system forms, like "Sales Order" - some of the fields can be updated. You can use our UI API to disable fields that you do not want edited.

If you think you have a good idea to enhance this behavior, please open a customer influence idea, and we can follow up on it.

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/887

Regards,
Shai

entry.title: Re: Update on the SAP Identity Management migration to Microsoft Entra
entry.content:
Much needed development. Looking forward to adopting in our hybrid environment.

Kudos to the Product team!

entry.title: SAP MDK - push notifications and other issues
entry.content:
Hi @Jitendra_Kansal and everyone, 

I am currently exploring SAP MDK and it's capabilities using licensed BTP account of my Org. I have few queries,

1. Is it okay if I use 'sap mobile services client' app which is publicly available to load the app content which I built and deployed in mobile services in production ? if yes, will it support push notifications which I am planning to trigger from S/4 Hana backend system by calling mobile service APIs ?

2. If I use the cloud build feature in SAP Mobile services to generate a MDK client, will it support push notifications ? I don't want to install MDK SDK locally to configure push notification settings, would be great if we have an option to do push notification settings in cloud build itself, if possible plz provide relevant blogs on that.

3.Looking for an answer to this issue https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-mdk-sdk-installation-error/qaq-p/12511985/comment-id/4837226#M4837226

@fjcarrasco 

Thanks in advance,

Alagar

entry.title: Timelines for Implementation of BW to DataSphere, Bw to BW4HANA and BW4HANA to Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We’re planning to transition our SAP Business Warehouse (BW) system to SAP Datasphere, and we’re also considering moving to SAP BW/4HANA and BW4HANA to DataSphere. We have a total of 450 BW extractors and 100 Advanced DataStore Objects (ADSO). Could anyone share insights or timelines for implementing these transitions? Any best practices, conversion approaches, or readiness checks would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: how Print-relevant purchasing document changes trigger printout
entry.content: Hi Jigang, I did the changes as you described above still PO Print is getting triggered for all the changes in PSA - instead of PO I worked on PSA actually, do you expect to make changes further to this?

entry.title: Re: MRP run on materials shared between plant and MRP area
entry.content: I tried with strategy 2 from the available options from 1-4, it is reflecting rightly the Sloc of the header only on the component which is not an assembly. for an assembly component, it doesn't take up the Sloc 0002 from header planned order but the dependent requirement is reflected on 0001. I have tried all possible values from 1 to 4 and it still doesn't work. Any feedbcack?

entry.title: Re: How to link to any performance form through SF story report
entry.content:
Hello Mathias,

You can try to add the following deep link to table: 

https://<app-server-domain>/sf/openFormByFormDataId?fDataId=<value>

Hope it helps.

I'm also investigating and if I find a better solution I'll let you know.

Best regard

entry.title: Re: cost component structure split in SAP S/4HANA Public...
entry.content: Hi BobShen, Thank you for your advise, we'll refer the the SAP help portal weblink. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: BAPI for Accounting Document Post and Reverse
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

You can use the function modules CALL_FB08 & CALL_FBRA in place of BAPI (BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_REV_POST).

This module with two functions will resolve the problem.

regards,

Awais Syed.

entry.title: Re: MB_RESERVATION_BADI and Fiori F4839 Manage Manual Reservations
entry.content: We have found our own solution. See answers for anyone interested,

entry.title: Re: Download multiple pay statements at one time in EC or...
entry.content:
Hi, 

You can go to the smartforms help and also use the cookbook for HRFORMs that can be downloaded from note 744147 - hrforms.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How can I create and Confirm Warehouse Task in one st...
entry.content: In addition I can share, that we are working on offering an additional parameter for this API which will allow to confirm the warehouse task even without resource assignment once this parameter is set. This will probably be delivered with 2502. This is plan only, subject to change.

entry.title: Re: MRP run on materials shared between plant and MRP area
entry.content: It finally worked! Very much thanks for this consultation when I almost thought this is not possible in standard! Really helpful and kudos the support. The reason it didn't work with strategy 2 previously was because I mistakenly hardcoded the sloc in the BOM to 0001 for the assembly which I blanked out for the fix.

entry.title: Re: What address to choose in SAP Learning Hub subscripti...
entry.content:
Hi @Fabian93 @PatrickL 
I receive the following information from the respective team:

We understand that you would like to purchase the SAP Learning Hub Standard edition license as an individual. Please note that as an individual purchaser (B2I), you can only make purchases by accepting SAP B2B Terms & Conditions.
As an individual purchaser, you should book the license under an organization (using your name as the company name and your  home address as the postal address). For VAT purposes, you can use a dummy VAT registration number in your country's specific format.

Please follow the link provided here and fill out the information as mentioned above to proceed with placing the order.

For more information on how to purchase, please visit www.sap.com/store.html

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: My Most Clever Response in a Job Interview
entry.content: What sort of thing do they normally say in response? Was it different in the job you didn't get offered?

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content:
Just to prove that this task is done:

Is this a reference to CSN? Ran the following:

cds compile srv/plain.cds -2 "json"

Returning:

{
"definitions": {
"plain": {
"@source": "srv/plain.cds",
"kind": "service",
"@rest": true
},
"plain.theAnswer": {
"kind": "function",
"returns": {
"type": "cds.String"
}
}
},
"meta": {
"creator": "CDS Compiler v4.9.4",
"flavor": "inferred"
},
"$version": "2.0"
}

entry.title: Document type for SAF-T Angola not maintained in view SNV_AO_DOCTPY_SD
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

While creating the billing document i am facing the below error - 

Document type for SAF-T Angola not maintained in view SNV_AO_DOCTPY_SD.

Can anyone help is there any other process to create document types and number range for Angola?

If yes, it will be really helpful if the steps can be shared.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Vrushali

entry.title: Re: Which one is preferred: Adapt UI or Adaptation Projects?
entry.content:
This is a great question! As you rightly noted, when it comes to implementing uncomplicated UI extensions— be it adding or removing fields, setting default views, renaming labels or titles, rearranging elements, simplifying the UI or introducing mashup content—the use of Key User Adaptation is allowing to avoid overhead of development and thus is highly recommended.

So, even developers or IT specialists are encourage to extend via key user adaptation and expedite the process from requirement to go-live, thereby minimising delays usually associated with development projects.

Despite it's simplicity focusing on adapting for all end users, key user adaptation also supports extending UI for specific user roles in SAP BTP ABAP environment or, by creating application variants and assigning them to different roles, in S/4HANA.

entry.title: Re: ACCESSING THE PERSONALIZATION IN FPM_LIST_UIBB_ATS: An Enhancement
entry.content:
Hello @laeeqsiddique,

Do you know any standard table where this personalization is stored?

Please respond!

Thanks!

entry.title: Transport Mexico Einvoice Notes to Quality and Production
entry.content:
Hello,

We have followed SAP Note 2565791 for Mexico Einvoice Implementation. We have successfully implemented all the notes in Development. We need to transport this from Dev system to Quality and Prod system.

We have captured all the notes under one Transport. But I have noticed there are a few SAP notes which require some pre implementation manual activity (like executing a program) which needs to be done separately in each environment. 

As all the notes are captured in the same task its difficult now to segregate them. 

Request your help, if anyone has faced such an issue?

entry.title: Balancing Field "Profit Center" in line item 006 not filled
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am trying to post Logistic invoice verification with unplanned delivery cost through EDI (RD04). After maintaining all the entries I am getting the error - 

'Balancing Field "Profit Center" in line item 006 not filled'

Message no. GLT2201

Diagnosis

The field Profit Center marked as balancing is not filled with any value in line item 006, even after document splitting.

System Response

The document cannot be posted.

Procedure

First check your entries.

Additional causes could be:

No value can be derived for this field from the current document data.

You have entered a document type that is not designed for this business purpose.

any suggestions on how to solve this will be appreciated...

Regards,

Ajinkya.

entry.title: Re: My Most Clever Response in a Job Interview
entry.content:
It's been a while since I've interviewed.  Usually if I participate in an interview it is for a position I know I am a good fit for so the responses were positive.

For the job I didn't get an offer for, the interviewer was honest at the time and said I didn't have a great deal of XML experience, which was required.

entry.title: Re: how to check to see if a value is numeric in sap hana
entry.content: But if you have only character '-' it will show as number. 😕

entry.title: Automatic Batch determination - s4 public cloud
entry.content:
Hope your are doing good,

I have a question regarding the Batch Determination process in SAP. We have configured Automatic Batch Determination using the FIFO method at the delivery level. When we create a delivery, the batch is assigned correctly using the FIFO method, which is great. However, we noticed that there is no batch split happening, does that single batch will be appear in second line only with cb99 ? as mentioned below , why is it not fetching in first line itself.

Could anyone please guide me on why this might be happening and how we can resolve it to ensure that batch split occurs as needed?


Thank you,
Best regards,
Pradeep K

entry.title: Re: A Comprehensive Guide to Using OLE Objects in SAP ABAP
entry.content: This would be a great post if the year was 2007.

entry.title: Re: How to migrate Convergent Charging from Oracle DB to HANA DB.
entry.content: Thank you for sharing the approach and your experiences!

entry.title: Re: MB_RESERVATION_BADI and Fiori F4839 Manage Manual Res...
entry.content:
For anyone dealing with this problem we managed to solved it in following way using new RAP objects. By using Eclipse ADT tools:

We have found out that Manual Reservations Fiori applications is using entity R_ReservationDocumentHeaderTP. This entity has in its behavior definition on our release enabled extension for validations and determinations.

Therefore we have created our own Behavior Definition extension:

extension implementation in class /XXX/bp_mmim_r_reservation unique;

extend behavior for ReservationDocHeader
{

    validation /XXX/mmimValidateHeaderBAPI on save { field GoodsRecipientName; }

    extend draft determine action Prepare {
        validation /XXX/mmimValidateHeaderBAPI;
        validation ReservationDocItem~/XXX/mmimValidateItemBAPI;
    }
}

extend behavior for ReservationDocItem
{
    validation /XXX/mmimValidateItemBAPI on save { create; update; }
    determination /XXX/mmimDetermineItemBAPI on modify { field plant; field product; }

}

We have created three methods:

  • /XXX/mmimValidateHeaderBAPI - validaton of reservation header
  • /XXX/mmimValidateItemBAPI - validation of reservation items
  • /XXX/mmimDetermineItemBAPI - determination of reservation items

Implementation of reservation header validation: The method simply call same method that we call in MB_RESERVATION_BADI->DATA_CHECK. In our situation we have our validation functionality enveloped in custom BADI so we can filter validations by WERKS but BADI in this implementation can be ommited and any method/FM can be called here. 

LV_ERROR_ELEMENT is string defining which FIORI UI field should indicate error. Names of fields are taken from entity R_ReservationDocumentHeaderTP (i.e. "GoodsRecipientName")

 

METHOD /xxx/mmimvalidateheaderbapi.

    DATA:
      lo_reservation_badi TYPE REF TO /xxx/mmim_reservation_badi_def,
      lt_changable        TYPE tdtab_c132,
      ls_resb             TYPE resb,
      ls_rkpf             TYPE rkpf,
      lv_error_element    TYPE string.

    READ ENTITIES OF r_reservationdocumentheadertp IN LOCAL MODE ##EML_READ_IN_LOCAL_MODE_OK
      ENTITY reservationdocheader
      FIELDS ( goodsrecipientname resvnverificationcompanycode ) WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
      RESULT DATA(lt_reservations).

    LOOP AT lt_reservations INTO DATA(ls_reservation).

      APPEND VALUE #( %tky = ls_reservation-%tky
                    %state_area = 'VALIDATE_WEMPF' ) TO reported-reservationdocheader.

      GET BADI lo_reservation_badi FILTERS werks = ls_reservation-resvnverificationcompanycode lgort = ''.

      ls_rkpf-wempf = ls_reservation-goodsrecipientname.

      CALL BADI lo_reservation_badi->data_check
        EXPORTING
          is_rkpf                  = ls_rkpf
        CHANGING
          cv_bo_entity_error_field = lv_error_element
        EXCEPTIONS
          external_message         = 1.
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
        IF lv_error_element IS NOT INITIAL.
          APPEND VALUE #( %tky = ls_reservation-%tky
                    %state_area = 'VALIDATE_WEMPF'
                    %msg = new_message( id = sy-msgid number = sy-msgno severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-error v1 = sy-msgv1 v2 = sy-msgv2  v3 = sy-msgv3  v4 = sy-msgv4 )
                    ) TO reported-reservationdocheader ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_reservationdocheader>).
          ASSIGN COMPONENT  lv_error_element OF STRUCTURE <ls_reservationdocheader>-%element TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<lv_behv>).
          IF sy-subrc = 0.
            <lv_behv> = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
          ENDIF.
        ELSE.
          APPEND VALUE #( %tky = ls_reservation-%tky
                    %state_area = 'VALIDATE_WEMPF'
                    %msg = new_message( id = sy-msgid number = sy-msgno severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-error v1 = sy-msgv1 v2 = sy-msgv2  v3 = sy-msgv3  v4 = sy-msgv4 )
                    ) TO reported-reservationdocheader.
        ENDIF.

      ENDIF.

    ENDLOOP.

  ENDMETHOD.

Implementation of reservation item is practiacly same as the one for reservation header. We are calling same code as in MB_RESERVATION_BADI->DATA_CHECK. Again our own custom checks are enveloped in our own BADI for WERKS filtering. And error handling differs if UI element can be pointed out on the screen or no. 

METHOD /xxx/mmimvalidateitembapi.

    DATA:
      lo_reservation_badi TYPE REF TO /xxx/mmim_reservation_badi_def,
      lt_changable        TYPE tdtab_c132,
      ls_resb             TYPE resb,
      ls_rkpf             TYPE rkpf,
      lv_error_element    TYPE string.

    READ ENTITIES OF r_reservationdocumentheadertp IN LOCAL MODE ##EML_READ_IN_LOCAL_MODE_OK
        ENTITY reservationdocitem
        FIELDS ( reservation
                 reservationitem
                 goodsrecipientname
                 goodsmovementtype
                 issuingorreceivingplant
                 reservationitmismarkedfordeltn
                 resvnitmwithdrawnqtyinbaseunit
                 resvnitmrequiredqtyinentryunit
                 baseunit
                 entryunit
                 product
                 plant
                 storagelocation
                 unloadingpointname
                 batch
                 matlcomprequirementdate )
        WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
        RESULT DATA(lt_res_items)
        BY \_reservationdocumentheadertp
        FIELDS ( reservation
                 goodsmovementtype
                 goodsrecipientname )
        WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
        RESULT DATA(lt_reservation).

    LOOP AT lt_res_items INTO DATA(ls_res_item).

      APPEND VALUE #( %tky = ls_res_item-%tky
                 %state_area = 'VALIDATE_ITEM'
                 %path-reservationdocheader-%is_draft = ls_res_item-%is_draft
                 %path-reservationdocheader-reservation = ls_res_item-reservation
                 ) TO reported-reservationdocitem.

      GET BADI lo_reservation_badi FILTERS werks = ls_res_item-plant lgort = ls_res_item-storagelocation.

      ls_rkpf = CORRESPONDING #( lt_reservation[ KEY entity COMPONENTS reservation = ls_res_item-reservation ] MAPPING rsnum = reservation wempf = goodsrecipientname ).
      ls_resb = CORRESPONDING #( ls_res_item MAPPING wempf = goodsrecipientname matnr = product bdter = matlcomprequirementdate
        lgort = storagelocation werks = plant rsnum = reservation rspos = reservationitem xloek = reservationitmismarkedfordeltn enmng = resvnitmwithdrawnqtyinbaseunit
        erfmg = resvnitmrequiredqtyinentryunit meins = baseunit erfme = entryunit ablad = unloadingpointname ).

      CALL BADI lo_reservation_badi->data_check
        EXPORTING
          is_rkpf                  = ls_rkpf
          is_resb                  = ls_resb
          ib_rap_call              = abap_true
        CHANGING
          cv_bo_entity_error_field = lv_error_element
        EXCEPTIONS
          external_message         = 1.
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
        IF lv_error_element IS NOT INITIAL .
          APPEND VALUE #( %tky = ls_res_item-%tky
                      %state_area = 'VALIDATE_ITEM'
                      %msg = new_message( id = sy-msgid number = sy-msgno severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-error v1 = sy-msgv1 v2 = sy-msgv2  v3 = sy-msgv3  v4 = sy-msgv4 )
                      %path-reservationdocheader-%is_draft   = ls_res_item-%is_draft
                      %path-reservationdocheader-reservation = ls_res_item-reservation
                      ) TO reported-reservationdocitem ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_reservationdocitem>).
          ASSIGN COMPONENT  lv_error_element OF STRUCTURE <ls_reservationdocitem>-%element TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<lv_behv>).
          IF sy-subrc = 0.
            <lv_behv> = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
          ENDIF.
        ELSE.
          APPEND VALUE #( %tky = ls_res_item-%tky
                      %state_area = 'VALIDATE_ITEM'
                      %msg = new_message( id = sy-msgid number = sy-msgno severity = if_abap_behv_message=>severity-error v1 = sy-msgv1 v2 = sy-msgv2  v3 = sy-msgv3  v4 = sy-msgv4 )
                      %path-reservationdocheader-%is_draft   = ls_res_item-%is_draft
                      %path-reservationdocheader-reservation = ls_res_item-reservation
                      ) TO reported-reservationdocitem.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.

    ENDLOOP.

  ENDMETHOD.

Last method that we implemented was for reservation item determination. Doing the same as we do in MB_RESERVATION_BADI->DATA_MODIFY In this method we are filling value to LGORT based on our custom logic (again enveloped in custom BADI) if it differs from the one on the screen. 

METHOD /xxx/mmimdetermineitembapi.

    DATA:
      lo_reservation_badi          TYPE REF TO /xxx/mmim_reservation_badi_def,
      lt_reservationdocitem_update TYPE TABLE FOR UPDATE r_reservationdocumentitemtp,
      ls_resb                      TYPE resb.

    READ ENTITIES OF r_reservationdocumentheadertp IN LOCAL MODE ##EML_READ_IN_LOCAL_MODE_OK
        ENTITY reservationdocitem
        FIELDS ( reservation
                 plant
                 reservationitem
                 goodsrecipientname
                 unloadingpointname
                 product )
        WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
        RESULT DATA(lt_res_items).

    LOOP AT lt_res_items INTO DATA(ls_res_item).

      IF ls_res_item-plant IS INITIAL OR ls_res_item-product IS INITIAL.
        CONTINUE.
      ENDIF.

      GET BADI lo_reservation_badi FILTERS werks = ls_res_item-plant lgort = ls_res_item-storagelocation.

      ls_resb = CORRESPONDING #( ls_res_item MAPPING  matnr = product
        lgort = storagelocation werks = plant ).

      CALL BADI lo_reservation_badi->data_modify
        CHANGING
          cs_resb = ls_resb.
      IF ls_resb-lgort <> ls_res_item-storagelocation.
        APPEND VALUE #( %tky = ls_res_item-%tky storagelocation = ls_resb-lgort ) TO lt_reservationdocitem_update.
      ENDIF.

    ENDLOOP.

    IF lt_reservationdocitem_update IS NOT INITIAL.
      MODIFY ENTITIES OF r_reservationdocumentheadertp IN LOCAL MODE
          ENTITY reservationdocitem
          UPDATE FIELDS ( storagelocation ) WITH lt_reservationdocitem_update
          FAILED DATA(ls_failed_modify)
          MAPPED DATA(ls_mapped_modify)
          REPORTED DATA(ls_reported_modify).
    ENDIF.

  ENDMETHOD.

 We have tested it and it works nicely. Therefore we achieved same level of validations and determinations from SAP GUI transaction MB21 and Fiori F4839 for reservations.

entry.title: Re: Advanced Event Mesh or APIM when to use what?
entry.content:
Hi Ramu,

it depends on the use case. With event-driven architecture you reap lots of benefits like decoupling of applications, fan-in/fan-out, realtime communication connecting any application anywhere etc etc

That said, Master Data Distribution is one of the most popular use cases with Advanced Event Mesh, since typically multiple applications want to be informed about changes as quickly as possible (aka realtime). 

Please let me know if you need anything else.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Assignment of „SAP Learning reporting user“ and/or „S...
entry.content:
Note:

  • Up to 5% of licensed users (or a maximum of 100) can be non-learners with a reporting or administration role. 

Source: https://learninghub.sap.com/documentation#:~:text=Reporting%20and%20administration%3A%C2%A0

entry.title: Re: Replacing a wrapped BAPI with a released business object interface
entry.content:
After creating a wrapper, how would anyone know that a new, released BO interface is available? It's been a challenge with SAP systems for decades that temporary fixes and wrappers go into Production and then no one reviews them, unless you have a big migration project (like ECC to S/4HANA). And it finding information about new functionality has been a challenge for just as long.

Does SAP plan to provide a code check tool that will identify that there is a replacement for a BAPI?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Extensibility – Simplified Guide for Beginners
entry.content: Very informative!

entry.title: Mastering Custom Access Rights in SAP Commerce Cloud: Unlocking Advanced Security Features
entry.content:
Are you looking to enhance the security and personalize access within your SAP Commerce Cloud setup? Our newest video is an essential guide on the powerful security feature of Custom Access Rights. This tutorial is perfectly tailored to help both new users and seasoned administrators gain comprehensive knowledge, seamlessly apply these rights, and deal with potential drawbacks.

Understanding type-based access and search restrictions can feel overwhelming. With our straightforward demonstration, we clarify these topics before diving into the complexities of Custom Access Rights. These allow defining arbitrary privileges on types, attributes, item instances, or abstract operations. These customized settings hold the key to fine-tuning your SAP Commerce Cloud environment according to exact organizational needs and roles.

However, it's crucial to recognize the limitations, such as their abstract nature which requires explicit enforcement and their impact on system performance when used excessively. This video not only explains how to implement these rights but also advises on the best practices to avoid common pitfalls, ensuring your system remains robust and efficient.

Our tutorial includes a series of live demonstrations in the SAP Commerce Cloud, where we show how to check and set permissions through the HAC scripting languages console. Alongside, you'll learn about the API functionalities, providing a clear view of how to programmatically manage Global, Item, and Type permissions.

Tailored for those who manage or develop within the SAP Commerce Cloud environment, this video is all you need to elevate your skills in managing Custom Access Rights effectively and responsibly.

Whether you're dealing with permissions at the item, type, or global level, our guide will arm you with the knowledge to use these tools wisely to enhance data security and operational efficiency.

Watch our video now at Custom Access Rights   and empower yourself to take full advantage of the security features in SAP Commerce Cloud like never before! Join us to ensure you’re making the most out of your SAP system's potential.

entry.title: Add user on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi all, currently I'm on SAP BTP (trial), is it possible I create a new user to access any services for example SAP Build Apps

Thanks,

Isyraf

entry.title: Insert duprec problem
entry.content:
In a project we had a lot of calculated table entries that are saved in a database table afterwards using INSERT db FROM TABLE itab.

Sometimes we had duplicate entries and got a short dump DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR.

Because of the amount of entries and because there are a lot of key columns, it was very hard to identify the duplicate entries. Therefore we did the following:

We catch the exception CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB and loop at the internal table to insert each entry separetly. With this trick we could identify the entry that had duplicate keys. 

REPORT.
DATA itab TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ztestew WITH EMPTY KEY.

START-OF-SELECTION.

  itab = VALUE #(
    ( matnr = 'A01' text = 'One' )
    ( matnr = 'A02' text = 'Two' )
    ( matnr = 'A03' text = 'Three' )
    ( matnr = 'A03' text = 'Four' )
     ).

  TRY.
      INSERT ztestew FROM TABLE itab.
      WRITE: / 'insert ok'.
    CATCH cx_sy_open_sql_db.

      LOOP AT itab INTO DATA(wa).
        INSERT ztestew FROM wa.
        IF sy-subrc > 0.
          WRITE: / 'insert duprec', wa-matnr.
          STOP.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.
  ENDTRY.

Unfortunately this behaviour does not work anymore in an ABAP Release 754 or 758 with HANA database.

The first entry of the table cannot be inserted although this entry is not duplicate.

Output: "insert duprec A01"

My assumption was that the output is "insert duprec A03" because this ist the entry that exists twice in the internal table.

I also tried to do a "ROLLBACK WORK" or "ROLLBACK CONNECTION default" before inserting the entries step by step.

Any ideas what to check or if there changed something the past years?

Thanks
~Enno

entry.title: Okx Referans Kodu: "2024OK" (Ekleme Nerede Yazar Güncel)
entry.content: Okx referans kodu= '2024OK' Okex 2024 yılı güncellemeleri ve en iyi referans kodu her zamanki gibi 2024OK 'dir. OKX 'e 2024OK referans kodunu kullanarak katılın en iyi indirim elde edin. Okx referans kodunu kaydolurken referans kodu ekleme alanına manuel şekilde 2024OK ifadesini girerek tamamlayabilirsiniz.

entry.title: Re: Output type not automatically triggered in billing
entry.content: Hey did you get the solution of output type not automatically triggered in billing document? I'm too facing the same problem. Please suggest..

entry.title: Binance Referans Kodu: "ZNKAUKP3" (Ekleme Nerede Yazar Güncel)
entry.content: Binance referans kodu= 'ZNKAUKP3' Binance 2024 yılı güncellemeleri ve en iyi referans kodu her zaman ki gibi ZNKAUKP3 'tür. Binance 'e ZNKAUKP3 referans kodunu kullanarak katılın en iyi indirim elde edin. Binance referans kodunu kaydolurken referans kodu ekleme alanına manuel şekilde ZNKAUKP3 ifadesini girerek tamamlayabilirsiniz.
